zh.Dedham, Colchester district, Essex, Engl: 英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆
zh.Dedham, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Backler於1550年出生在英國艾可迪德哈姆時，他的父親John Backler20歲，母親Agnes Barber20歲。他於1573年2月3日與Joan Upcher在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1584年享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Backler于1550年出生在英国艾可迪德哈姆时，他的父亲John Backler20岁，母亲Agnes Barber20岁。他于1573年2月3日与Joan Upcher在英国英格兰艾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1584年享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Backler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: occupational name, status name from Norman French bacaler ‘a young knight, a novice in arms’. The [k] is a characteristically Norman form where Central French has [tʃ]; see Batchelor .

variants.name: Backner
meanings: 1 English: occupational name from Middle English * baconer, * baconour ‘curer of bacon, bacon-seller’.
2  English: perhaps also a variant of   Backler  .

variants.name: Batchelor
meanings: English: status name for a young knight or novice at arms, Middle English and Old French bacheler (medieval Latin baccalarius). The word had already been extended to mean ‘(young) unmarried man’ by the 14th century, but it is unlikely that many bearers of the surname derive from the word in that sense.

History: The Reverend Stephen Bachiler (c. 1561–1656) was a Puritan nonconformist, born in Hampshire, England, who came to New England in 1632, at the age of 71. In 1638/9 he was the leader of the founders of Hampton, NH.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Backler was born in 1550, in Dedham, Essex, England, his father, John Backler, was 20 and his mother, Agnes Barber, was 20. He married Joan Upcher on 3 February 1573, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1584, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Backler est né en 1550, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Backler, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Agnes Barber, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joan Upcher le 3 février 1573, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1584, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Backler 1550 in Dedham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Backler 20 und seine Mutter Agnes Barber 20. Er hat am 3. Februar 1573 in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom Joan Upcher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1584 im Alter von 34 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Backler è nato il nel 1550 nel Dedham, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Backler, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Barber, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Joan Upcher il 3 febbraio 1573, nel Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1584, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Backlerが1550年にイギリスエセックスデドハムで生まれた時，父John Backlerは20歳，母Agnes Barberは20歳であった。1573年2月3日にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムでJoan Upcherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1584年に34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Backler(이)가 1550년 영국 에세스 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Backler(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Barber(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1573년 2월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 Joan Upcher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1584년 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Backler родился в 1550 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Backler было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Barber, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Upcher 3 февраля 1573 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1584 г. в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Backler nació en 1550, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Backler, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Agnes Barber, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Joan Upcher el 3 de febrero de 1573, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1584, a la edad de 34 años.
